records.commitment: Deploy trained LoRA to ComfyUI, run 10 test generations, approve character
records.notes: Install LoRA in ComfyUI models/loras. Run 10 test generations: varied poses, outfits, settings. Evaluate character consistency. If approved: begin daily content production. If not: identify issues and re-train or adjust parameters.

records.commitment: Build image-to-video workflow in ComfyUI for AI reel production
records.notes: WAN 2.2 i2v workflow: static image -> animated reel. 3-5 second clips. Edit in CapCut. Target: 3 reels/week production capacity. TikTok: use as slideshow. IG/Fanvue: video. This unlocks the full content pipeline.

records.commitment: Post first 3 pieces of Fanvue content for AI model
records.notes: First Fanvue posts. Mix: 1 intro post, 1 SFW content, 1 tease/preview. Captions: personality matching character voice. Tag appropriately. Watermark on all. Begin chatter DM responses immediately when subscribers arrive.

records.commitment: Launch first PPV mass DM campaign to all fans (once 20+ subscribers)
records.notes: Once 20+ paying subscribers: mass DM with locked PPV. Price: $15-25. Tease in DM copy without showing content. First real revenue test. Track: DM open rate, PPV purchase rate, avg PPV revenue. Report results to Piia.

records.commitment: Add Fanvue link to IG/TikTok accounts (once 500 followers on best account)
records.notes: Do NOT add Fanvue link before 500 followers (algorithm penalty). Use Linkme (NOT Linktree — shadowban risk). Bio text: do NOT say OF/Fanvue. Use: secret page, exclusive content. This opens the revenue funnel from social to Fanvue.

records.commitment: Connect Stripe in Systeme.io — activate Power Independence Academy funnel
records.notes: Systeme.io (balsas37@proton.me): Settings > Payment > Connect Stripe. Replace checkout URLs in 4 funnel pages. Test purchase with test card. Go live. 15 minutes. HIGHEST LEVERAGE pending action for 2+ weeks. Do this — everything else is built.

records.commitment: Train LoRA model on GPU — WAN 2.1, sigmoid timesteps, 2000-3000 steps
records.notes: Dataset must be captioned first (Week 2). Vast AI (~$5 compute cost). AI Toolkit: rank 32-64, sigmoid timesteps, LR 0.0001 or Prodigy. Review checkpoints every 250 steps. Stop at best result (2000-2600 steps). Test generations with trigger word.

records.commitment: Post-trip Lagoon debrief: audit gaps, fix SOPs, Dubi sign-off on full SOP library
records.notes: Debrief with Dubi (video call or in person). Review trip metrics. Identify every gap. Fix each SOP. Dubi signs off on complete library. Target: 8+ SOPs total, all with video walkthroughs, Dubi trained and confident.

records.commitment: Post first TikTok slideshows for AI model (Day 8+ post-engagement phase)
records.notes: Day 8+ after engagement phase. Post SLIDESHOWS ONLY (AI video = instant shadowban on TikTok). Use proven hook formats from swipe file. 1 post/day. SFW only. No OF/Fanvue in bio yet. Engage with comments immediately.

records.commitment: Scale IG posting to 2 reels/day + add carousels with poll stickers
records.notes: Week 2 of warmup: scale to 2 reels/day. Add carousels with poll stickers (boosts reach per guide). Begin IG boost ($11-15/day, More Profile Views objective, USA+UK+Canada targeting). Track followers daily. Target: 200 followers by end of Week 3.

records.commitment: Update CRETE tracker, file all trip documents, update Critical Numbers
records.notes: File all documents from Sirewall trip. Update oaxaca-tracker.md with mix design results and Phase 1 cost estimate. Update Crete Critical Number (Construction Budget) with actual estimate from Michael. Begin permit research for Oaxaca rammed-earth construction.

records.commitment: Follow up Michael Palethorpe in writing for mix design doc + Phase 1 cost estimate
records.notes: If not received during trip: email/WhatsApp Michael by Mar 15 requesting written deliverables. File in workspace/crete/. Update oaxaca-tracker.md. Update Aitable Crete Critical Number once estimate received.

records.commitment: Document soil inspection results + all Sirewall trip deliverables in CRETE tracker
records.notes: Within 48hrs of returning (by Mar 15). File: mix design PDF, Phase 1 estimate, soil analysis, site photos. Update oaxaca-tracker.md. Share with Piia for Aitable updates.

records.commitment: Caption LoRA training dataset for AI model (20-30 images, JoyCaption/Gemini)
records.notes: Caption each image: describe what you DONT want burned in. Leave consistent features uncaptioned. Create unique trigger word. This unblocks LoRA training. Can do during trip downtime on laptop.

records.commitment: Create 2 IG accounts on mobile data + 48hr do-nothing period then first reel
records.notes: Create accounts using prepaid SIM (mobile data ONLY). Do nothing for 48hrs. Then Days 2-3: watch US reels. Day 4+: post first reel. No bio link. Warmup is non-negotiable — skipping = account death.

records.commitment: Create 2 TikTok accounts + days 1-7 engagement phase (niche scroll, comment, save)
records.notes: TikTok: no warmup needed, but 7-day engagement phase before posting. Scroll niche content, like, comment, save. Build swipe file of hook formats that get 1000+ views. High-comment = algorithm fuel. First post: Day 8.

records.commitment: Brief Filipino chatters on full PPV script, pricing psychology, DM upsell strategy
records.notes: Now that Fanvue is live: full chatter briefing. Never give price first. PPV sequence: tease/wait/price. Fan type detection. Tip ladder. $50+ session target. Assign chatter manager. Set shift schedule. Weekly check-ins via WhatsApp.

records.commitment: Monitor Lagoon WA bridge performance during Sirewall trip — log any failures
records.notes: This is the live test. Check WA bridge logs Mon-Fri. Log: inquiries responded (count), bookings confirmed (count), any Beno escalation required. Target: 0 Beno contacts. If bridge goes down: Dubi handles manually. Compile report by Mar 14.

records.commitment: Post on r/OnlyFansChatter to hire chatter VA ($4/hr, detail hours needed, PPV-focused)
records.notes: Do this BEFORE the Sirewall trip (March 8). Post the job: role description, $4/hr rate, hours per day, required: experience with PPV-based OF management, available immediately. Screen 3-5 applicants. Hire best candidate this week. Separate from Filipino chatters already on standby — this is the chatter MANAGER.

records.commitment: Write vehicle checkout SOP and WA inquiry handling SOP — film video walkthrough for both
records.notes: Priority: these two SOPs are the most critical before leaving for Puerto Escondido March 8. Checkout SOP: vehicle condition checklist, fuel level, key handover, safety brief script. WA Inquiry SOP: how to respond, pricing script, booking confirmation steps. Film 5-10 min video for each. Send to Dubi.

records.commitment: Fly to Puerto Escondido March 8 — complete Sirewall site visit with Michael Palethorpe
records.notes: Trip: March 8-13. Must come back with: mix design document + Phase 1 cost estimate. Take photos and video of site. Document soil sample process. Ask Michael specifically: what are the exact materials needed, what is his timeline estimate, what permits are required. Share all documents with Piia within 24 hours of return.

records.commitment: Research and source 20-30 reference images for first AI model character design
records.notes: Character design decision first: pick viral balance of oddness + beauty (pink hair? unusual eyes? distinctive feature?). Then source or generate 20-30 reference images. Dataset composition: 70% face/upper body (varied expressions/angles), 20% full body (varied outfits), 10% back views. Keep hair consistent if you want it baked in. Variety in: backgrounds, lighting, angles. 512x512 minimum resolution.

records.commitment: Brief Dubi on Lagoon operations handoff before March 8 departure
records.notes: In-person or video call with Dubi before March 8. Walk through: WA bridge responses, vehicle checkout process, emergency protocol. Make sure Dubi knows: who to contact for mechanical issues, what IS and is NOT an escalation to Beno, how to handle damage situations. Test: send Dubi a mock WA inquiry and have him respond — review the response.

records.commitment: Confirm Sirewall trip logistics — flight, accommodation, Michael Palethorpe meeting schedule
records.notes: Flight to Puerto Escondido confirmed for March 8. Verify: accommodation booked for Mar 8-13. WhatsApp Michael to confirm meeting time/location on site. Prepare questions for Michael: exact materials list, Phase 1 scope, labor estimate, permit requirements for rammed-earth in Oaxaca, his availability post-trip for follow-up questions.

records.commitment: List all Lagoon recurring tasks requiring Beno — delegation audit doc
records.notes: DO THIS TODAY (Mar 7). Write list of every task Beno does for Lagoon. This is the SOP priority list. Quick brain dump — can refine later. Share with Piia for tracking.

records.commitment: Write SOP: Return inspection + damage assessment, film video walkthrough
records.notes: Must be done BEFORE March 8 departure. Walk-around checklist, fuel, damage pricing guide, customer comms template. Film 5-10 min video. Send to Dubi for review.

records.commitment: Write SOP: Emergency contacts, incident protocol, escalation rules
records.notes: Must be done BEFORE March 8 departure. Escalation logic: what warrants calling Beno vs. not. Emergency contact list. Film walkthrough. Send to Dubi.

records.commitment: Activate Filipino chatters — WhatsApp intro, shift schedule, access to Fanvue account
records.notes: Chatters on standby since Feb 16. Activate NOW. Intro WhatsApp message, assign shifts, give Fanvue DM access. Brief on basic tone. Full PPV briefing comes Week 2 once Fanvue is live.

records.commitment: Set up Fanvue AI model account — 18+ enabled, auto PPV, no free trials, intro video
records.notes: Fanvue setup checklist: 18+ content enabled, subscription price set, disable free trials without payment method, auto PPV bundles configured, intro video added (shows in Discover feed), watermark set, payment connected. Do BEFORE first content post.

records.commitment: Decide AI character concept: visual design, niche, name, viral angle
records.notes: This is a creative decision, not a technical one. 30 minutes max. Commit to a concept. Viral balance: oddness + beauty. Pick: niche (fitness/lifestyle/cosplay?), distinctive feature (pink hair? unusual eyes?), character name, personality/voice for chatters. Write 1 paragraph character brief.

records.commitment: Source prepaid SIM for IG accounts — Telcel/AT&T Mexico mobile data
records.notes: Buy prepaid SIM before creating IG accounts. Mobile data ONLY — no WiFi for account creation (trust score penalty). Also: aged Gmail from AccsMarket. Can be done same day as account creation.
